reason: Verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to fetch and display the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agents listed in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260513-201131-unut" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status matches expected acceptable state (idle or running)
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully and agent started processing
GitHub access request card appeared asking to allow GitHub account access — Card displayed with pre-selected GitHub account
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access — Access granted and agent resumed processing
GitHub API permission request appeared for "GET /user" — Agent requested permission to fetch user information
Clicked "Allow Once" to permit GitHub API request — Permission granted and agent continued processing
Waited for response (completed in ~1m 14s, within 4-minute limit) — Agent returned response successfully
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot documenting the successful response — Screenshot captured showing complete interaction and response
